name: ai-ready-scaffold
description: Cloneable AI-agent-ready project scaffold: SDD pipeline, code graph, boundary enforcement, evals, handoff loops, migration safety — all free, all cross-tool.

scripts.lint: npm run check:mandates && npm run check:commands && npm run check:breadcrumbs && npm run check:agnostic
scripts.check:all: npm run check:mandates && npm run check:commands && npm run check:breadcrumbs && npm run check:agnostic && npm run check:migrations && node .trellis/scripts/run-evals.mjs

_comment_devDeps: DevDeps are for JS/TS adopting projects. Non-JS projects can remove them. Framework scripts (.trellis/scripts/*.mjs) only require Node.js.
_comment_templates: Per-stack config templates live in templates/. init.sh copies the matching ones.
